fixtures._comment: frontend-tools 'Sunset' pill — 1st leg: emit change_background tool call. Built-in-agent rides the OpenAI Responses API, which mints non-deterministic `fc-*` function-call IDs (not the canonical `call_d5_*` ID we emit), so the post-tool follow-up cannot pin on toolCallId like LGP does. AND the 3-pill probe carries prior tool results across turns, so hasToolResult: false fails after the first pill. We use sequenceIndex: 0 to gate the 1st-leg fixture to the FIRST time this pill's userMessage is matched; once exhausted the post-tool fixture below (no sequenceIndex) catches the 2nd-leg request.

match.userMessage: Make the background a sunset gradient

fixtures._comment: frontend-tools 'Sunset' pill — 2nd leg (post-tool-result). Catches the follow-up request after the 1st-leg fixture above is exhausted (sequenceIndex >= 1 → its check fails → falls through here).

match.userMessage: Make the background a sunset gradient

fixtures._comment: frontend-tools 'Forest' pill — 1st leg. Same sequenceIndex pattern as Sunset.
frontend-tools 'Forest' pill — 2nd leg. Catches the follow-up after 1st-leg exhausts its sequenceIndex slot.
frontend-tools 'Cosmic' pill — 1st leg. Same sequenceIndex pattern.
